nasb.text: Also I will restore the captivity of My people Israel, And they will rebuild the ruined cities and live in them; They will also plant vineyards and drink their wine, And make gardens and eat their fruit.

esv.text: I will restore the fortunes of my people Israel, and they shall rebuild the ruined cities and inhabit them; they shall plant vineyards and drink their wine, and they shall make gardens and eat their fruit.

cnv.text: 我必使我的子民以色列被擄的人回歸， 他們必重建荒廢的城，住在其中； 他們必栽種葡萄園，喝園中的酒； 建造果園，吃園中的果子。

ccb.text: 我要使我被掳的以色列子民返回故乡， 他们要重建废城并住在城中， 栽种葡萄园，喝园中酿出的美酒， 整理园圃，吃园中出产的佳果。
